title: Need Tables and Reports in Fraction Views
excerpt: Currently only decimals can be used for the columns and reports. It would be great to have an option to have it report in decimals OR fractions (ie. reporting 3-1/16" instead of 3.0625). Basic feature in excel that makes…

posts.author: wellcohardwoods (Vaughn)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently only decimals can be used for the columns and reports. It would be great to have an option to have it report in decimals OR fractions (ie. reporting 3-1/16" instead of 3.0625). Basic feature in excel that makes it difficult to match up with Monday.
